bird.name: Long-legged pipit
bird.summary: The long-legged pipit (Anthus pallidiventris), also known as the long-clawed pipit, is a species of bird in the family Motacillidae. It is…

relations.subject: Long-legged pipit
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Long-legged pipit
relations.evidence: The long-legged pipit is found in natural grasslands, but also in pastures, farmland, airfields and in bare areas around villages and towns
